items.title: UnitedHealth has scrapped mentions of DEI from website, TechCrunch reports
items.description: It was not clear whether UnitedHealth pulled down the pages to represent a shift in terminology or an actual change in its policies, the report said.  UnitedHealth Group did not immediately respond to a Reuters request for comment.  Per TechCrunch's report, multiple pages of the UnitedHealth website dedicated to DEI now redirect to a "page not found" error when compared to archived copies of the site.

items.title: US is only country debating GLP-1 insurance coverage for weight loss: Cigna CEO Cordani
items.description: Cigna (CI) CEO David Cordani is not convinced of the benefits of GLP-1s for weight-loss patients and said the US is the only country among developed nations where insurance coverage is being debated.
